name: krb5-locales
title: krb5-locales
description:
internationalization support for MIT Kerberos
Kerberos is a system for authenticating users and services on a network.
Kerberos is a trusted third-party service.  That means that there is a
third party (the Kerberos server) that is trusted by all the entities on
the network (users and services, usually called "principals").
.
This is the MIT reference implementation of Kerberos V5.
.
This package contains internationalized messages for MIT Kerberos.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use krb5-locales because internationalization support for MIT Kerberos.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use krb5-locales as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair krb5-locales with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `krb5-locales --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
